scenarios.name: Excellent Student
scenarios.description: High performance, ahead of schedule, all activities completed

scenarios.name: Average Student
scenarios.description: Typical progress, some activities completed, on track

scenarios.name: Struggling Student
scenarios.description: Behind schedule, low completion rate, needs support

scenarios.name: Procrastinator
scenarios.description: Last-minute completion, overdue tasks, cramming behavior

scenarios.name: Edge Cases
scenarios.description: Unusual patterns, extreme values, boundary conditions
